name: ARA TM · Railway Ubuntu SSH + Claude Code
description: Ubuntu 24.04 SSH server with root access, a full developer toolkit and Claude Code pre-installed. Connect via SSH as root, run Claude Code inside a tmux session. Bilingual (EN/FA), OpenRouter-ready cloud workstation.
readme:
# ARA TM — Railway Ubuntu SSH + Claude Code

Your own cloud workstation on Railway. SSH in as **root**, with **Claude Code** pre-installed.

## Deploy
1. Set a **ROOT_PASSWORD** (required) in the Variables tab.
2. The template opens a **TCP Proxy** on port `22` automatically.
3. Redeploy, then connect:

```bash
ssh root@<your-railway-domain> -p <port>
```

## Claude Code
```bash
cl      # or:  زم   → tmux session running Claude Code
```
Set `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN` (optional) to enable Claude Code.

## Variables
- `ROOT_PASSWORD` (required) — root password
- `SSH_USERNAME` / `SSH_PASSWORD` (optional) — secondary sudo user
- `AUTHORIZED_KEYS` (optional) — SSH public key(s) for root
- `ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN` (optional) — Claude Code token
- `GITHUB_TOKEN` (optional) — set it and your `/root/src` is auto-backed up to a private `ara-tm-src-<id>` repo, restored on every redeploy
- `SYNC_INTERVAL` (optional, default `180`) — sync interval in seconds
- `APP_LANG` (optional, default `en`) — `en` or `fa`

## 🔑 Tokens / توکن‌ها
- **GitHub** (`GITHUB_TOKEN`, scope `repo`) → auto-backup `/root/src` to a private `ara-tm-src-<id>` repo, restored on every redeploy. Create one: https://github.com/settings/tokens/new?scopes=repo
- **OpenRouter** (`ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN`) → powers Claude Code. Create a key: https://openrouter.ai/keys
- Full fancy guide with one-click links: see `TOKENS.md` in the repo.

© ARA TM · Maintained by Parham_7991

ROOT_PASSWORD.description: Mandatory password for the root user. The container will refuse to start without it. Change it after first login.

SSH_USERNAME.description: Optional secondary sudo user. Must be set together with SSH_PASSWORD.

SSH_PASSWORD.description: Password for the optional sudo user. Set together with SSH_USERNAME.

AUTHORIZED_KEYS.description: SSH public key(s) for root key-based authentication. Password login stays enabled.

ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Optional Claude Code token (OpenRouter or Anthropic). Applied into the settings on every container start, so editing it takes effect on the next deploy.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub token with 'repo' scope. When set, /root/src is auto-backed up to a PRIVATE repo named ara-tm-src-<id> and restored on every redeploy, so your files survive container rebuilds.

SYNC_INTERVAL.description: Seconds between automatic /root/src syncs (only used when GITHUB_TOKEN is set).

APP_LANG.description: Runtime message language: en (English) or fa (Persian).
